scripts.type-check: pnpm run prepare:artifacts && DIFFGAZER_SKIP_ARTIFACT_PREPARE=1 turbo run type-check
scripts.test: pnpm run prepare:artifacts && DIFFGAZER_SKIP_ARTIFACT_PREPARE=1 turbo run test
scripts.test:types: pnpm run prepare:artifacts && DIFFGAZER_SKIP_ARTIFACT_PREPARE=1 turbo run test:types
scripts.verify: pnpm run prepare:artifacts && pnpm run verify:monorepo && pnpm run validate:artifacts:check && DIFFGAZER_SKIP_ARTIFACT_PREPARE=1 turbo run type-check && DIFFGAZER_SKIP_ARTIFACT_PREPARE=1 turbo run test && DIFFGAZER_SKIP_ARTIFACT_PREPARE=1 turbo run test:types && pnpm run smoke
scripts.test-ci: pnpm run prepare:artifacts && pnpm run validate:artifacts:check && DIFFGAZER_SKIP_ARTIFACT_PREPARE=1 turbo run type-check && DIFFGAZER_SKIP_ARTIFACT_PREPARE=1 turbo run test && DIFFGAZER_SKIP_ARTIFACT_PREPARE=1 turbo run test:types && DIFFGAZER_SMOKE_STRICT_SKIPS=1 pnpm run smoke && pnpm run verify:monorepo
scripts.release-check: pnpm run prepare:artifacts && pnpm run validate:artifacts:check && DIFFGAZER_SKIP_ARTIFACT_PREPARE=1 turbo run type-check && DIFFGAZER_SKIP_ARTIFACT_PREPARE=1 turbo run test && DIFFGAZER_SKIP_ARTIFACT_PREPARE=1 turbo run test:types && DIFFGAZER_SMOKE_STRICT_SKIPS=1 pnpm run smoke && pnpm run smoke:packages && pnpm --filter @diffgazer/add pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @diffgazer/ui pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @diffgazer/keys pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter diffgazer pack --dry-run && pnpm run verify:monorepo && git diff --check
scripts.prepare:library-artifacts: pnpm --filter @diffgazer/registry build && pnpm --filter @diffgazer/keys build && pnpm --filter @diffgazer/ui build && pnpm --filter @diffgazer/add generate:bundles && node --import tsx cli/add/scripts/copy-generated.ts
scripts.prepare:artifacts: pnpm run prepare:library-artifacts && DIFFGAZER_SKIP_ARTIFACT_PREPARE=1 pnpm --filter @diffgazer/docs prepare:generated
scripts.validate:artifacts: pnpm run prepare:artifacts && pnpm run validate:artifacts:check
scripts.smoke: pnpm run smoke:cli && pnpm run smoke:packages && pnpm run smoke:shadcn
